title: Steuerboard runtime hardening
goal: Harden Steuerboard execution so it exposes runtime truth and refuses unsafe operation against a drifted Bureau checkout.

acceptance.assertion: Steuerboard output includes the runtime truth needed to diagnose checkout drift.
Unsafe drift states produce an explicit stop instead of silent execution.
Receipts include branch, head, base, and drift classification.

metadata.operator_lab_run: not applicable — planning task definition only

local_validation: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_v2.py -q -k claim_next or checkout_next or runtime_drift_check or no_eligible_cli_paths_expose_runtime_truth

acceptance_mapping.runtime-truth-visible: claim-next output now includes runtime_truth with branch, head, base, dirty state, drift classification and findings
acceptance_mapping.fail-closed-on-drift: claim-next and checkout-next return status runtime-drift-blocked with exit code 2 when the Bureau checkout is dirty
acceptance_mapping.receipt-evidence: execution envelopes now include runtime_truth and schema permits the field

implementation_evidence.self_review: PASS: CLI dispatcher enforces the runtime gate before claim/checkout execution, dirty checkout blocks before run creation, direct Dispatcher tests remain non-enforcing by default, and no fetch/pull/runtime repair automation is added.

metadata.outcome: Steuerboard claim-next and checkout-next now expose runtime truth and fail closed on dirty Bureau checkout drift before execution.
